DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-01-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
(415-577-0563) Mele Lowman for Plaintiff/ opposing party .
No other appearances.

Hearing is held. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS CARRINGTON MORTGAGE SERVICES, LLC, CARRINGTON FORECLOSURE SERVICES, LLC DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: R.Wong; Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-22-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mele Lowman (no information provided) Plaintiff/opposing party, in Pro Per.
Kristina M. Pelletier, Esq. (949-477-5050) of Wright, Finlay & Zak, LLP for Defendants/Moving party CARRINGTON MORTGAGE SERVICES, LLC and CARRINGTON FORECLOSURE SERVICES, LLC via Court Call.

The Court announces tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS CARRINGTON MORTGAGE SERVICES, LLC and CARRINGTON FORECLOSURE SERVICES, LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to address in good faith all issues raised by demurrer. First Amended Complaint to be filed in served within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)
